job_title: Software Engineer I - Active Support (New Grad)
ats_keywords: Experience processing large volumes of data
matched_keywords: Experience processing large volumes of data
strengths: Hands-on ETL/ELT with Airflow and dbt
weaknesses: No explicit experience with LLM frameworks/AI platforms
No mention of transactional email or SMS systems
Limited explicit customer support/product post-purchase experience
Resume graduation timing differs from job requirement
improvement_bullets: Developed and integrated automated customer support notification flows using Python, leveraging LLM APIs to categorize and resolve user issues, reducing manual support volume.
Engineered backend services for transactional email and SMS delivery, ensuring high-availability communication for customer post-purchase updates.
Modernized user-facing account features by refactoring legacy UI components, directly improving the 'MyAccount' experience and reducing feature load times.
Collaborated with product teams to implement AI-driven proactive support features, utilizing OpenAI API integrations to automate responses to common customer inquiries.
Built and maintained robust data pipelines that serve as the backbone for customer-facing support systems, ensuring real-time data accuracy across account management platforms.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Software Engineer I - Active Support (New Grad) opportunity with StubHub. I am interested in this opportunity because of StubHub’s commitment to redefining the post-purchase experience through innovative, scalable technology. What interests me about working for StubHub is its mission to turn potentially stressful post-purchase moments into seamless, delightful customer experiences; this focus on blending customer empathy with high-scale engineering intrigues me because of my background in building data-intensive applications. I believe my full-stack development experience and my data-centric approach to problem-solving would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my time at Haven Technologies, I approached problems by centering the user experience within my technical design. In fact, I collaborated with stakeholders to translate user feedback into production code, which required me to refine our REST API integrations to synchronize data across systems. This resulted in a 15% increase in feature adoption and a 60% improvement in data accuracy, directly impacting the quality of the customer interface. Ultimately, I know that the Software Engineer I role at StubHub would allow me to bring my full-stack technical expertise to build proactive support flows that reduce customer anxiety. Additionally, my role as an Analytics & Operations Lead at Shine Masters Cleaning Services enabled me to develop my automation and product-thinking skills. I designed and implemented automated workflows that tracked revenue and customer engagement patterns across multiple social media and web platforms. This initiative reduced manual operational tasks by 30% and increased lead conversion by 40%, demonstrating my ability to build systems that scale. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, APIs, and AI-framework exploration in working on automated customer support systems at StubHub. I know that my technical proficiency and product-first mindset align with what it takes to succeed at the Software Engineer I role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
